title: Handheld Cheese Grater, Stainless Steel Kitchen Grater Flat Cheese Grater with Non-Slip Handle and Base Food Grater Handheld Cheese Grater for Potato, Vegetable, Butter
features: Versatile Usage: Perfect for grating cheese, vegetables, potatoes, butter, chocolate, citrus fruits and more, this handheld cheese grater is a versatile tool that simplifies food preparation tasks in the kitchen.

Easy to Clean & Store: This flat cheese grater is dishwasher safe and can be easily cleaned by running it under water. It also features a convenient hanging handle for easy storage and accessibility in your kitchen.
Non-Slip Design: Designed with a non-slip rubber wraped handle and base, this kitchen grater provides stability and control while grating, ensuring safety and preventing accidents in the kitchen.
Quality Stainless Steel: Crafted from sturdy stainless steel, this cheese grater ensures rust resistance and long-lasting performance for effortless grating of cheese, vegetables, butter, and more.
Efficient and Sharp Blade: Equipped with sharp stainless steel blades, this grater ensures efficient and uniform grating, allowing you to achieve desired textures and consistencies with ease.
description: Description: Crafted from rust-resistant stainless steel, this cheese grater features a robust frame that withstands pressure without bending, ensuring long-lasting performance and durability. This multifunctional grater is not limited to cheese; it's perfect for grating ginger, garlic, nutmeg, chocolate, citrus fruits, butter, and a variety of vegetables like carrots, potatoes, and zucchini, offering versatile use in your kitchen.
